CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnUpdate
CodeBlockMethod.Code: self.Time = self.Time + delta if self.Time > 3 then self:spawn() self.Time = 0 end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: spawn
CodeBlockMethod.Code: local modelID = "model://345da0ca-d771-4f7b-89bb-924e0583ba17" local modelName = "monster" local parent = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/maps/map01") math.randomseed(os.time()) for i= 1, 2, 1 do local x = math.random(-50, 50) / 10 local position = Vector3(x, 0, 0) _SpawnService:SpawnByModelId(modelID, modelName, position, parent) end
